ogTitle: Coolum Beach vs Coombabah: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Coolum Beach and Coombabah.
heading: Coolum Beach vs Coombabah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Coolum Beach, Queensland and Coombabah, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coolum Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Coombabah (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Coolum Beach or Coombabah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Coolum Beach has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Coombabah scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Coolum Beach scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Coombabah scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Coolum Beach or Coombabah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coolum Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
